name: jdy_get_data
description_zh: 按数据ID查询单条表单记录
description: Retrieve a single data record by its _id. Returns data object with all field values plus system fields: _id, appId, entryId, creator{username,name,departments,type,status}, createTime, updateTime. Field values vary by type: text/number/datetime as plain values; subform as array of objects each with _id; user/dept as username/dept_no. Rate limit: 30/s.
